values.description:
Base URL for your cloud-deployed service. Replace with your actual URL:
  AWS:    https://<alb-dns>.amazonaws.com
  GCP:    https://<service>-<hash>-uc.a.run.app
  Azure:  https://<app>.azurecontainerapps.io
  K8s:    https://<ingress-host>
Default stock ticker for the 'Custom symbol' requests. Change this to any supported ticker (e.g., MSFT, TSLA, NVDA, GOOGL, META, JPM, AMZN)
Alpha Vantage API key used by the cloud service. With 'demo', only IBM returns live data. For full live data, set ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY env var in your cloud deployment.
Auto-populated by the AAPL lookup test script. Stores the last retrieved price.
